title: The Crooked Cocoon
overview: The film "The Crooked Cocoon" is about Sima Servati, a famous and beloved actress who hates men and constantly doubts her husband. She believes that all the misfortunes in the world are due to men, until a strange and unexpected incident turns her life upside down...
